metadata.name: yahoo-fin
metadata.summary: Download historical stock prices (daily / weekly / monthly), realtime-prices, fundamentals data, income statements, cash flows, analyst info, current cryptocurrency prices, option chains, earnings history, and more with yahoo_fin.

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info._parse_earnings_json
documentation: ## Earnings functions

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_earnings_history
documentation:
Inputs: @ticker
Returns the earnings calendar history of the input ticker with 
EPS actual vs. expected data.

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_earnings_for_date
documentation:
Inputs: @date
Returns a dictionary of stock tickers with earnings expected on the
input date.  The dictionary contains the expected EPS values for each
stock if available.

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_earnings_in_date_range
documentation:
Inputs: @start_date
        @end_date
        
Returns the stock tickers with expected EPS data for all dates in the
input range (inclusive of the start_date and end_date.

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_currencies
documentation: Returns the currencies table from Yahoo Finance

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_futures
documentation: Returns the futures table from Yahoo Finance

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_undervalued_large_caps
documentation: Returns the undervalued large caps table from Yahoo Finance

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_quote_data
documentation:
Inputs: @ticker

Returns a dictionary containing over 70 elements corresponding to the 
input ticker, including company name, book value, moving average data,
pre-market / post-market price (when applicable), and more.

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_market_status
documentation: Returns the current state of the market - PRE, POST, OPEN, or CLOSED

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_premarket_price
documentation:
Inputs: @ticker

Returns the current pre-market price of the input ticker
(returns value if pre-market price is available.

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_postmarket_price
documentation:
Inputs: @ticker

Returns the current post-market price of the input ticker
(returns value if pre-market price is available.

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_company_info
documentation:
Scrape the company information for a ticker

@param: ticker
Company Information Functions

functions.name: yahoo_fin.stock_info.get_company_officers
documentation:
Scrape the company information and return a table of the officers

@param: ticker
